reply_text: @MRVV93exactly!! Cole only changed enough to pull Jackie back in after she rejected his toxic behavior and went for his brother. But it’s easy for a guy to know when a girl really likes him. The constant stares she gave him. The ease dropping on his conversation. The question she kept asking everyone about Cole. Those are all signs that a person is really into you. So Cole being the player that he is, only changed because he felt that rejection was a sign of defeat. So he turned up the charm and seduction on young girl who was vulnerable and very little experience to get what he wants. If the show is being realistic then it would tell the truth that guys like Cole only want sex at that and almost never is looking for the love of their life. Cole knows that he can get any girl at that school and good percentage of even hotter girls in college if he attends. He is not looking for a love match in Jackie at all. Alex on the other hand is more of a fit for her because he’s to insecure to take advantage of her vulnerabilities and immaturity like Cole( a guy who was sleeping with half the girls in the school). This is why so many girls get heart broken in general because they go after the guy who has multiple options but then wanna call all men bad once they’ve been cheated on or mistreated by guys like Cole.
